emblems.title: His Nurse is the Earth
emblems.epigram: The philosophical child must be nurtured by the earth-mother.
emblems.poem:
The infant stone seeks mother earth,
to learn of growth from death and birth.

emblems.title: Maintain the Gentle Heat
emblems.epigram: Tend the incubating stone at perfect temperature.
emblems.poem:
Too hot and all shall turn to smoke,
too cold and stone shall never soak.

emblems.title: Go to the Woman Who Washes
emblems.epigram: Whiten the black matter through repeated washing.
emblems.poem:
Go where the washerwoman wrings the sheet,
and make the soilèd matter clean and sweet.

emblems.title: Join Brother and Sister
emblems.epigram: Broker the marriage of two warring alchemists.
emblems.poem:
Brother hot and sister cold,
must be joined in love and gold.

emblems.title: The Toad Bearing Its Chain
emblems.epigram: Establish a circular system where waste becomes food.
emblems.poem:
The toad bears the golden chain round,
in endless loops where dew is found.

emblems.title: Sow Gold in White Foliated Earth
emblems.epigram: Plant the golden seed and tend through seasons.
emblems.poem:
Sow thy gold in the foliate white,
and reap a harvest born of light.

emblems.title: Balance the Winged and Wingless Birds
emblems.epigram: Understand when to restrain volatility and when to allow flight.
emblems.poem:
One has wings and one has not,
both must rest within one pot.

emblems.title: Hatch the Philosophical Bird
emblems.epigram: Pierce the egg with precisely-controlled heat.
emblems.poem:
Pierce the sealed egg with the sword of flame,
and what slept within shall answer to its name.

emblems.title: Nurture the Mercury Tree
emblems.epigram: Watch mercury crystallize and bear fruit.
emblems.poem:
The tree bears apples, white then red,
from mercury crystallized and spread.

emblems.title: Master Sympathetic Addition
emblems.epigram: Add like to like without explosion or loss.
emblems.poem:
Fire to fire, mercury to its kind,
yet balance is the key you'll find.

emblems.title: Make Latona White and Tear Up False Books
emblems.epigram: Purify matter while discerning truth from falsehood.
emblems.poem:
Whiten the dark body of Latona fair,
while burning lies that foul the air.

emblems.title: The Sun and Moon in Conjunction
emblems.epigram: Achieve the marriage of Sol and Luna.
emblems.poem:
Sun and Moon in perfect embrace,
from their union springs all grace.

emblems.title: The Serpent Devouring Its Tail
emblems.epigram: Complete the cycle of dissolution and regeneration.
emblems.poem:
The serpent bites its tail in endless dance,
encoding time's perpetual trance.

emblems.title: Ouroboros Dragon
emblems.epigram: The cycle completes itself endlessly.
emblems.poem:
In rings of fire the dragon flies,
its ending is its birth, its birth its prize.

emblems.title: The Wolf and the King
emblems.epigram: Understand the devouring of the fixed by the volatile.
emblems.poem:
The wolf consumes the kingly form,
then gold emerges from the storm.

emblems.title: Reconcile the Winged Lioness and Wingless Lion
emblems.epigram: Achieve perfect union of volatility and fixation.
emblems.poem:
She flies above, he holds the ground,
together they create the sound.

emblems.title: Master the Four Fires
emblems.epigram: Apply the right fire at the right moment.
emblems.poem:
Vulcan raw, then Mercury's might,
Luna's gentle, Apollo's bright.

emblems.title: The Phoenix Rising
emblems.epigram: From ashes rises the perfected form.
emblems.poem:
From bitter ash the phoenix flies,
with wings of gold it takes the skies.

emblems.title: The Dragon Needs to Die Once More
emblems.epigram: Continued transformation toward perfection.
emblems.poem:
The dragon falls, then lives again,
each death a step in alchemical pain.

emblems.title: The Return to Nature's Bosom
emblems.epigram: Integration of the work with natural cycles.
emblems.poem:
Return the stone to nature's breast,
and let the elements come to rest.

emblems.title: The Philosopher's Stone
emblems.epigram: Achievement of the great work's central jewel.
emblems.poem:
The stone that glows with inner light,
contains the universe held bright.

emblems.title: The Hermaphrodite Born of Fire and Water
emblems.epigram: Union of opposites in perfected form.
emblems.poem:
Neither man nor woman, both and one,
born from fire and water in the sun.

emblems.title: It Rains Gold
emblems.epigram: The multiplication of the perfected matter.
emblems.poem:
From heaven falls the golden rain,
bringing profit without end or pain.

emblems.title: The Wolf and the King Redux
emblems.epigram: Renewed confrontation with dissolution.
emblems.poem:
The wolf returns to test the king,
but now his strength will let him win.

emblems.title: The Dragon's Final Breath
emblems.epigram: The ultimate sacrifice of the volatile principle.
emblems.poem:
The dragon breathes his final flame,
and from his death springs eternal fame.

emblems.title: The Fruit of Human Wisdom is the Wood of Life
emblems.epigram: The centermost emblem—the axis of transformation.
emblems.poem:
With head of knowledge, hand of toil,
approach the Lady, void of coil.

emblems.title: The Garden of Hesperides
emblems.epigram: Paradise regained through the completed work.
emblems.poem:
The garden blooms with golden fruit,
guarded by no serpent, absolute.

emblems.title: Heal the King Through the Steam Bath
emblems.epigram: Purification through three-stage bathing and heating.
emblems.poem:
Sweat the black bile from the King,
three baths shall make new life to spring.

emblems.title: The Stone Lives in the Fire
emblems.epigram: Test the Stone's resistance to extreme heat.
emblems.poem:
Like salamander born of flame,
the stone endures and stays the same.

emblems.title: The Sun Needs the Moon
emblems.epigram: Achieve the sacred marriage of Sol and Luna.
emblems.poem:
Sun needs moon as cock needs hen,
and from their union life springs again.

emblems.title: The Eagle Carries the Child
emblems.epigram: Elevation of the purified matter toward perfection.
emblems.poem:
The eagle rises with the child,
toward the stars, keen and wild.

emblems.title: The Scepter and the Crown
emblems.epigram: Authority and dominion over matter achieved.
emblems.poem:
The scepter rules, the crown adorns,
the king now wears the victor's thorns.

emblems.title: The Hermaphrodite Awakes
emblems.epigram: The perfected being stirs to consciousness.
emblems.poem:
From sleep the hermaphrodite wakes,
and all of creation quakes.

emblems.title: The Marriage of the King and Queen
emblems.epigram: Sacred union of active and receptive powers.
emblems.poem:
King and Queen in arms embrace,
where opposites meet in this place.

emblems.title: The Three Kings Bearing Gifts
emblems.epigram: Threefold offering to the perfected work.
emblems.poem:
Three kings bow with gifts so rare,
to honor what none can compare.

emblems.title: The Treasure Rises from the Deep
emblems.epigram: Extraction of the precious from the profound.
emblems.poem:
From ocean's depths the treasure rises,
held aloft through all surprises.

emblems.title: The Ascent of the Vessel
emblems.epigram: Elevation of the perfected matter toward apotheosis.
emblems.poem:
The vessel rises through the night,
climbing toward the perfect light.

emblems.title: The Crucible Burns Brightest
emblems.epigram: The furnace glows at its most intense.
emblems.poem:
The crucible glows white with heat,
the transformation is nearly complete.

emblems.title: The Purification Complete
emblems.epigram: The cleansing reaches its final stage.
emblems.poem:
All impurity has fallen away,
only the pure shall ever stay.

emblems.title: The Water Runs Clear
emblems.epigram: Clarity achieves transparency in the work.
emblems.poem:
The water that runs from the stone
is clear as crystal, bright and shone.

emblems.title: The Ascent Continues
emblems.epigram: The upward journey never ceases.
emblems.poem:
Ever upward does the ascent go,
from depths below to realms of glow.

emblems.title: The Hermaphrodite in Darkness
emblems.epigram: Completion in the darkest place.
emblems.poem:
In darkness deep the work lies still,
completed by unwavering will.

emblems.title: The Child Emerges from the Forge
emblems.epigram: Birth of the perfected being from the furnace.
emblems.poem:
The child steps forth from flames of red,
new-forged and glorious, fully fed.

emblems.title: The Dragon Transforms
emblems.epigram: Metamorphosis of the serpent into its perfected form.
emblems.poem:
The dragon sheds its ancient skin,
to show the golden light within.

emblems.title: Sol Completes the Work
emblems.epigram: The sun achieves its destined purpose.
emblems.poem:
The sun descends to bless the stone,
and all the work is now complete and known.

emblems.title: The Two Eagles Reunite
emblems.epigram: Reunion of the separated principles at the apex.
emblems.poem:
The eagles meet above the clouds,
in splendor that defies all crowds.

emblems.title: The Wolf and the Dog
emblems.epigram: Reconciliation of wild and tame natures.
emblems.poem:
The wolf and dog walk side by side,
with neither fear nor wounded pride.

emblems.title: The King in the Closed Spring
emblems.epigram: Restoration of the king through multi-stage healing.
emblems.poem:
The king lies sick within the spring,
through your work his health we'll bring.

emblems.title: The Child with Three Fathers
emblems.epigram: Generation of the Stone from three paternal principles.
emblems.poem:
Phoebus, Vulcan, Hermes three,
together birth what none can be.

emblems.title: The Woman and the Serpent
emblems.epigram: Ultimate union—dissolution and regeneration.
emblems.poem:
Woman and serpent, blood to blood,
from death emerges life's great flood.

foundation.name: Nigredo (Blackening)
foundation.description: The beginning—dissolution and decomposition of the material.

purification.name: Albedo (Whitening)
purification.description: The work of washing and cleansing toward purity.

union.name: Citrinitas (Yellowing)
union.description: The first yellowing—growth and preparation for the final stage.

mastery.name: Rubedo (Reddening)
mastery.description: The final reddening—mastery and perfection achieved.

celestial.name: Rubedo (Celestial)
celestial.description: Cosmic dimensions of the completed work.

turning_point.name: The Center (XXVIth Emblem)
turning_point.description: The axis of the entire work—the balance point.

final.name: Final Stage
final.description: The climactic moment of healing and completion.

ultimate.name: Ultimate Return
ultimate.description: The final resurrection and eternal cycle.
